title: Backend Engineer, Python
description: Own service-side features for our order platform, from schema design through deployment.
responsibilities: Design and ship REST APIs used by 200K+ daily active users
Own PostgreSQL schema changes and migrations
Instrument services for latency and error-rate visibility
requirements: 2+ years building production Django or FastAPI services
Comfortable with Kafka or another message broker
Solid SQL and query optimization skills

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build customer-facing features end to end across a Django API and a React front end.
responsibilities: Ship features across DRF endpoints and a React/TypeScript client
Collaborate directly with design on UX details
Write and maintain test coverage with pytest
requirements: Experience with both a Python backend and a React frontend
Familiarity with CI/CD and cloud deployment (AWS or similar)
Comfortable owning a feature from spec to production

title: AI/ML Engineer (LLM Applications)
description: Build retrieval-augmented applications on top of LLM APIs for enterprise clients.
responsibilities: Design RAG pipelines using pgvector and LLM APIs
Optimize latency for real-time inference endpoints
Evaluate and tune retrieval quality against labeled test sets
requirements: Hands-on experience with LangChain or similar agent frameworks
Experience with FastAPI and async Python
Understanding of embedding models and vector search

title: Software Engineer, Platform
description: Join a platform team supporting always-on services with rotational on-call coverage.
responsibilities: Participate in a rotational shift schedule for coverage
requirements: Strong fundamentals in Python and SQL
Willingness to work rotational shifts, fully onsite
Good written communication for handoffs between shifts

title: Data Platform Engineer
description: Build and maintain ETL pipelines feeding analytics dashboards used company-wide.
responsibilities: Optimize PostgreSQL queries against large datasets
requirements: Experience with Kafka and batch/stream ETL
Track record of measurable performance improvements

title: Frontend Engineer, React
description: Own the customer storefront UI, integrating with a Django-backed REST API.
responsibilities: Build and maintain React components with strong test coverage
Improve page load performance across the storefront
requirements: Comfortable consuming REST APIs built on Django
Eye for UX detail and accessibility
